core_mechanism: inference of hidden discrete categories from several conditionally-independent noisy indicators via a finite latent-class mixture model whose likelihood is factorized according to a directed acyclic graphical model, whose conditional-(in)dependence structure fixes the number of latent classes and the model's identifiability
brief_reason: The abstract models imperfect test results as noisy indicators of latent measurands using latent class analysis, and uses a DAG of conditional-dependence relations to determine the number of latent classes, rewrite the likelihood, and assess identifiability.
